summary: Iteration 47: PIN Change, Tab Reorder, Heritage Multi-select, Culture Learning Testing. Backend: All 13 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Tab order correct, Word Bank rename verified, Change PIN button on student cards works, Heritage multi-select and Culture Learning topics visible. ONE BUG: Student 'Change My PIN' feature exists in code (StudentLogin.jsx) but NOT accessible - /student-login redirects to unified login page which lacks this feature.

ui_bugs.issue: Student 'Change My PIN' feature NOT accessible. StudentLogin.jsx has the feature but route /student-login redirects to /login?type=student which uses GuardianLogin.jsx (no Change My PIN)

action_items: FIX: Change App.js route from `<Route path="/student-login" element={<Navigate to="/login?type=student" replace />} />` to `<Route path="/student-login" element={<StudentLogin />} />` so students can access 'Change My PIN' feature
Add import for StudentLogin in App.js if not present
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/students/{id}/change-pin - Parent can change student PIN (requires auth, validates current PIN)
POST /api/student/change-my-pin - Student can change own PIN (no auth needed, just current PIN)
Both endpoints validate: current PIN correct, new PIN 4-10 digits, numeric only, unique across students
Tab order in GuardianPortal.jsx is correct: Students, Word Bank, Audio Memories, Audio Books, Progress, ID Cards, Invite & Earn, Subscription, Wallet, Offers, Affiliate, FAQ
Marketplace renamed to 'Word Bank' in tab label (line 39)
Heritage multi-select implemented with CULTURAL_CONTEXTS array and custom_heritage write-in
Culture Learning Topics (CULTURE_LEARNING_TOPICS) added with 16 options affecting story generation

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All features work except student login Change My PIN is inaccessible due to routing

context_for_next_testing_agent: PIN change APIs fully work. Parent can change student PIN from student card UI (Change PIN button visible). Student 'Change My PIN' at login page NOT working - needs route fix in App.js. Heritage is now multi-select with custom write-in. Culture Learning Topics available in student form.

parent_change_student_pin.ui_location: Student card -> Change PIN button -> form with Current PIN, New PIN, Confirm New PIN

student_change_own_pin.issue: StudentLogin.jsx exists with Change My PIN but route redirects to unified login
